rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §43.0031, which governs ethics policy for management and investment of the Permanent School Fund. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 43.0031. PERMANENT SCHOOL FUND ETHICS POLICY.
_note: Rule text concerns SBOE ethics policy for PSF investments; no bearing on homestead exemption amounts.
